final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for an automotive brand launch campaign.

Style/medium: needs a cinematic, high-impact visual aesthetic with a translucent/luminous quality — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a wide landscape layout with title and subtitle text positioned for slide-cover hierarchy
Subject: must include the 长安起源Q06 as the hero subject
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, awe-inspiring backdrop that feels premium and brand-aligned — exact scene is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a stunning, immersive atmosphere with depth and visual impact — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with automotive brand prestige — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a translucent, glassy or atmospheric surface quality — exact treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06" (primary title), "9月上市" (subtitle)
Constraints: 
Avoid:
